title: Element Analysis — Zschoche v. Mercedes Elective Officials
subtitle: Office of the Ombudsman · RAG-fed, grounded in the embedded law library

elements.heading: Conflict of interest — officials judging their own cause (R.A. 3019 §3(e); R.A. 6713 §4(a))
elements.rag_query: Mayor chaired the CART and Sangguniang Bayan members voted to close complaints filed against themselves did not inhibit relinquished the chair temporarily conflict of interest

elements.heading: Manifest partiality through a sustained, cross-department refusal (R.A. 3019 §3(e), §3(f))
elements.rag_query: LGU in the process of securing the records then refused to release for a year sustained pattern Mayor Assessor Treasurer Municipal Engineer Sangguniang Bayan obstruction public records

elements.heading: An operative directive with no basis in law (R.A. 11032 §21)
elements.rag_query: CART resolution directs the LGU shall not release the requested documents unless proof of legal personality requirement not found in the Citizen's Charter additional requirement
